commands.title: Anonymous LDAP Authentication (Kerberos check)
commands.description: Tests if user accounts exist without valid credentials using Kerberos.

commands.title: Test LDAP Credentials
commands.description: Tests authentication to LDAP with a known username and password.

commands.title: Authenticate with NTLM Hash
commands.description: Authenticates using an NTLM hash instead of a password.

commands.title: Enumerate All Users
commands.description: Fetches all domain users from the LDAP server.

commands.title: Export Users to File
commands.description: Exports all users to a text file for offline analysis.

commands.title: Enumerate Active Users Only
commands.description: Lists only the active (non-disabled) user accounts.

commands.title: List All Groups in Domain
commands.description: Fetches all domain groups via LDAP.

commands.title: List Members of Specific Group
commands.description: Lists all members belonging to the specified group.

commands.title: Query Specific User Entry
commands.description: Performs a raw LDAP query for the Administrator account. No specific attributes selected.

commands.title: Query Specific LDAP Attributes
commands.description: Returns selected attributes of the Administrator user.
